creating-folders-and-files.label: Kreye katab ak fichye
creating-folders-and-files.summary: Sèvi ak mkdir, mkdir -p, ak touch pou bati yon estrikti pwojè ki pwòp nan tèminal Linux la.

creating-folders-and-files-try-it-1.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan enstriksyon an, apre sa kouri ls, cat oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon travay Eseye li ou menm pèmèt ou pratike kòmand nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye katab paran yo anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou avèk ls, cat oswa find anvan ou klike sou Tcheke.

try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch0.title: Eseye li ou menm: kreye yon katab avèk mkdir
try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch0.prompt: Kouri `mkdir school-notes` pou kreye one katab.

try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch1.title: Eseye li ou menm: kreye katab andedan katab avèk mkdir -p
try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch1.prompt: Kouri `mkdir -p project-kit/src project-kit/docs` pou kreye nested katabs nan one etap.

try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch2.title: Eseye li ou menm: kreye fichye vid avèk touch
try_creating_folders_and_files_sketch2.prompt: Kouri `touch touch-lab/todo.txt touch-lab/agenda.txt` pou add two empty fichyes pou the existing katab.

sc-mkdir-basic-purpose.title: Idantifye objektif kòmand lan
sc-mkdir-basic-purpose.prompt: Kisa the main job of `mkdir` nan the Linux tèminal?
sc-mkdir-basic-purpose.hint: Panse ak whether li kreyes a katab, kreyes a fichye, oswa montres existing items.

help.concept: `mkdir` stands for make directory, ak a directory se another name for a katab.
help.hint_1: This kòmand changes the espas travay structure by adding a container for fichyes.
help.hint_2: It fè not display kontni ak li fè not kreye a regular text fichye.

options.c: List fichyes nan the katab aktyèl la

mc-when-to-use-mkdir-p.title: Chwazi pi bon itilizasyon pou mkdir -p
mc-when-to-use-mkdir-p.prompt: Ki kòmands correctly use `mkdir -p` pou kreye nested katabs for a class project? Chwazi tout sa ki mache.
mc-when-to-use-mkdir-p.hint: Chèche kòmands that kreye a path avèk parent katabs included.

help.concept: `mkdir -p` se used when ou want pou kreye a full katab path, including parent katabs that may not exist yet.
help.hint_1: A nested path has slashes, such as `course/week1/notes`.
help.hint_2: Chwazi kòmands where one kòmand can kreye multiple katab levels an sekiritely.

mc-valid-project-setup.title: Chwazi kòmand ki mete fichye ak katab yo kòrèkteman
mc-valid-project-setup.prompt: Ou se starting a reading project. Ki kòmands would correctly kreye the requested items? Chwazi tout sa ki mache.
mc-valid-project-setup.hint: Chèche kòmands that match the item type: katabs avèk one kòmand, fichyes avèk another.

help.concept: Sèvi ak `mkdir` oswa `mkdir -p` for katabs ak `touch` for fichyes. Matching the kòmand pou the item type se the key idea.
help.hint_1: A katab like `reading` needs a directory kòmand.
help.hint_2: A fichye like `reading/list.txt` can be kreyed avèk `touch` once the katab path exists, oswa by using a full path apre kreye the katab.

dr-folder-setup-order.title: Mete etap preparasyon yo nan lòd
dr-folder-setup-order.prompt: Mete sa yo tèminal actions nan yon lòd ki fè sans for kreye a new notes espas travay ak tchekeing it.
dr-folder-setup-order.hint: Create the katab anvan moving into it, ak kreye the fichye apre ou se inside the katab.

help.concept: A an sekirite tèminal workflow se pou kreye a katab, deplase into li if needed, kreye fichyes there, ak then enspekte the rezilta.
help.hint_1: You cannot kreye `todo.txt` inside `notes` until `notes` exists oswa ou specify a full path.
help.hint_2: The verification etap belongs at the end, apre the katab ak fichye have been kreyed.

ci-create-single-folder.title: Kreye yon katab pwojè
ci-create-single-folder.prompt: You kreye a `projects` katab nan the tèminal ak want pou prove li worked. Ki follow-up action makes the rezilta visible?
ci-create-single-folder.hint: Choose the action that montres the new katab apre ou kreye it.

help.concept: `mkdir` kreyes a katab nan the repètwa aktyèl la, ak `ls` se a quick way pou konfime the katab now appears nan the espas travay.
help.hint_1: Create exactly one katab named `projects` where ou se now.
help.hint_2: After kreye `projects`, run a lising kòmand nan the same kote so the tchekeer can see that ou verified it.

ci-create-single-folder.template: After kreye a katab, li helps pou ____ so ou can verify the change.
choices: enprime yon rezilta ou ka wè

fb-touch-purpose.title: Konplete lide kòmand lan
fb-touch-purpose.prompt: Ranpli kòmand ki manke a so the sentence matches Linux tèminal behavior.
fb-touch-purpose.hint: Sèvi ak the kòmand that kreyes an empty fichye if li fè not already exist.

help.concept: `the missing term` se commonly used pou kreye empty fichyes quickly depi the tèminal.
help.hint_1: This kòmand works on fichyes, not katabs.
help.hint_2: It se the kòmand ou would use for something like `notes.txt` oswa `todo.txt`.

fb-touch-purpose.template: To kreye an empty fichye named `notes.txt`, use `[blank1] notes.txt`.

sketch-1.title: Kreye yon katab avèk mkdir
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
`mkdir` kreyes a new katab nan ou current kote. This se useful when ou want pou start organizing a project instead of keeping everything nan one place.

For example, if ou se setting up school notes, ou might kreye a katab named `notes`:

```bash
mkdir notes
ls
```

Step by etap:
- `mkdir notes` kreyes a katab called `notes`.
- `ls` liss what se nan the katab aktyèl la so ou can konfime that `notes` now exists.

If `notes` appears nan the lis, the kòmand worked. A common abitid se pou run `ls` right apre kreye something so ou can verify the espas travay changed the way ou expected.

sketch-2.title: Kreye katab ki andedan lòt katab avèk mkdir -p
sketch-2.bodyMarkdown:
Sometimes ou need several katabs inside each other. `mkdir -p` kreyes the whole path at once.

Example:

```bash
mkdir -p school/history/week1
ls school
```

Step by etap:
- `mkdir -p school/history/week1` kreyes `school`, then `history` inside it, then `week1` inside that.
- The `-p` option prevents ou depi having pou kreye each level one by one.
- `ls school` lets ou enspekte the first katab nan that path.

Without `-p`, trying pou kreye a deep path all at once usually fails if the parent katabs fè not exist yet.

sketch-3.title: Kreye fichye vid avèk touch
sketch-3.bodyMarkdown:
`touch` kreyes an empty fichye when that fichye fè not already exist. This se a fast way pou set up placeholders such as notes, drafts, oswa tchekeliss.

Example:

```bash
touch todo.txt ideas.txt
ls
```

Step by etap:
- `touch todo.txt ideas.txt` kreyes two empty fichyes.
- `ls` montres both fichye names nan the katab aktyèl la.

You can also combine katabs ak fichyes nan a small project setup. For example, apre kreye a `school` katab, ou might kreye `school/reading-list.txt` so the katab already contains a fichye ou plan pou use.
